citations.narrative:
The facility did not submit their annual report for fiscal year 2025, which was due to the Deputy Administrator on or before
December 1st, 2025. Each reporting facility shall submit an annual report covering the use of live animals in the previous
federal fiscal year on or before December 1st of each calendar year to assure that professionally acceptable standards
governing the care and use of animals are followed.
The facility shall submit an annual report to the Deputy Administrator and the report shall cover the previous Federal fiscal
year.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.36(a)  Repeat
   
Annual report. 
The facility did not submit their annual report for fiscal year 2025, which was due to the Deputy Administrator on or before 
December 1st, 2025. Each reporting facility shall submit an annual report covering the use of live animals in the previous 
federal fiscal year on or before December 1st of each calendar year to assure that professionally acceptable standards 
governing the care and use of animals are followed. 
 
The facility shall submit an annual report to the Deputy Administrator and the report shall cover the previous Federal fiscal 
year. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
